compliance.required_disclaimer: Subject to status and credit checks

red_flag_examples: needs certainty of funding before proceeding
told yes by another lender already
looking for venture capital or equity investment
CCJ or court judgment in the last year
needs this urgently with no flexibility on timeline
company under administration or being wound up
director recently resigned or charged with fraud
significant change in company directors recently
dispute or mismatch between directors and the person making the enquiry

sector_product_hints.Manufacturing: asset-backed lending and invoice finance to smooth cash flow and fund equipment upgrades or capacity expansion
sector_product_hints.Healthcare: flexible equipment finance and practice growth support, with dedicated account management and experience in professional practice lending
sector_product_hints.Food & Beverage: seasonal cash-flow options and predictable repayment structures designed around the rhythms of food and beverage businesses
sector_product_hints.Construction: project-based lending, equipment finance, and property development facilities structured around contract timelines
sector_product_hints.Logistics: fleet financing and working capital facilities to support expansion and manage the gap between invoicing and payment
sector_product_hints.default: tailored lending solutions for established UK businesses, with a focus on flexibility and understanding your specific sector

prohibited_output_examples: we can have this sorted by end of week
this should be straightforward to approve
we can get this moving quickly for you
we can almost certainly help with this
this looks like a strong application
I'm confident we can do something here
we should be able to turn this around fast
